productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Crystal Black Sandal
description: Look all the more elegant with this stylish pair of slippers from carlton london. Designed to enhance your feminine side, the crystal embellishments on the straps make your beautiful feet look all the more wonderful. Team this with ethnic wear for those lovely evening parties.Upper Leather straps for enhanced comfort and style Fabric leather toe separator for added comfort Crystal and metallic embellishments for a classy look Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Ridges on leather footbed for added comfort Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontally grooved forefoot and heel for extra grip and stability shoe careWipe surface using a branded shoe conditioner
